concerns.text: T015 [P] (ECDF plot generation) is marked parallel-safe but T016 (fit models) is not, yet both read from the same cleaned dataset (T011 output). If they can run in parallel, both should be [P]. If sequential, T015 should not be [P]. Inconsistent [P] tagging creates ambiguity about execution order.
T027 (documentation updates) comes before T028 (code cleanup), but documentation may depend on final code state. T028 should precede T027 to ensure docs reflect cleaned code.
T028 (code cleanup) comes before T029 (CI workflow configuration), but CI should be configured before cleanup to ensure the workflow is in place during cleanup. T029 should precede T028.

T030 (quickstart validation) comes after T027 (documentation updates), but if quickstart.md is part of documentation, T027 should complete before T030 validates it. Current ordering risks validating incomplete documentation.

T021 (Kruskal-Wallis) and T022 (mixed-effects) both read from the same cleaned dataset (T011 output) and could potentially run in parallel if they don't share state. Consider marking both [P] or documenting the dependency explicitly.
